title: Paso Fino Horse Evaluation
tagline: Upload a hoof-beat recording and get a gait diagnosis based on cadence and regularity.
upload_hint: Only 16-bit PCM mono WAV is accepted. Audio is analyzed in memory and discarded.
session_demo: Demo session active · ready to evaluate
token_hint: Only if you want to use your own RinglyPro token instead of the demo session. Leave empty for the demo.
history_empty: No evaluations yet for this horse.
err_need_token: A JWT token is required for this action.
err_need_horse: Select or register a horse first.
err_415: Unsupported format: only 16-bit PCM WAV is accepted.
juez_sub: Upload the run's video (and audio): the system classifies the gait modality and scores it like a judge.
up_nota: In production, equine pose is extracted from the video. In this demo, with no in-browser equine pose model, the gait is simulated on the server and the full analysis runs for real.
flag_mismatch: Detected modality does not match the entered category
err_need_inscripcion: Select a competitor (or create demo data).
rank_pick: Pick an event and category to see the ranking
rank_empty: No results in this category yet.
neural_sub: Automatic findings watching the gait and the category, with severity and recommended action.
neural_none: No findings detected for this gait.
cta_juez_title: Want to upload a VIDEO of the pass?
cta_juez_sub: Classify the gait (paso fino / trocha / trot-canter), score it like a judge, and generate the ruling + Neural findings.
pay_unavailable: Payments not configured. Contact the administrator.
login_sub: Sign in to your account to analyze
signup_sub: Create your account to get started
signup_note: $10 gives you 10 credits (10 analyses). 1 credit per video analysis and 1 per sound analysis.
err_pass_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.
err_login_required: Log in and have credits for a real analysis. The simulation is free.
err_no_credits: Out of credits. Recharge your account to continue.
session_need_login: Log in to evaluate (1 credit per analysis)
